title: IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026 (Out) – Download Hall Ticket at IIM Indore

detail.title: IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026 (Out) – Download Hall Ticket at IIM Indore
detail.short_info: IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026 released. Download your hall ticket from the official IIM Indore website. Check exam date, steps to download, details, and important instructions here.

sections.heading: IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026 (Out) – Download Hall Ticket at IIM Indore

content.text: The IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026 has been officially released by the Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Indore. Candidates who registered for the Integrated Programme in Management (IPM) can now download their hall ticket from the official website. The admit card is a mandatory document to appear for the entrance exam.
Direct Link: IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026 (Out)

sections.heading: How to Download IPMAT Indore Admit Card 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to access your hall ticket:

items: Visit the official IIM Indore website.
Click on the IPMAT 2026 admission section.
Open the admit card download link.
Enter your login credentials (Application Number and Password/Date of Birth).
Click on submit.
Download and print the admit card for future use.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on IPMAT Admit Card

content.text: Candidates should carefully verify the following details:

items: Candidate’s Name
Roll Number
Application Number
Exam Date and Time
Exam Centre Address
Photograph and Signature
Important Instructions

content.text: If any discrepancy is found, contact the exam authority immediately.

items: Carry a printed copy of the admit card to the exam center.
Bring a valid photo ID proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, etc.).
Reach the exam center at least 30–45 minutes before reporting time.
Do not carry prohibited items such as electronic devices or study materials.
